UpdateResolverRule.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](DNS/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateResolverRule.name: Forwarding rule name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters `-_/ .`; must start with a letter or Chinese character; length 1–65
UpdateResolverRule.description: Forwarding rule description, up to 200 characters
UpdateResolverRule.dnsServerConfigs: IP address and port of the external DNS system
UpdateResolverRule.dnsServerConfigs.ip: IP address of the external DNS server
UpdateResolverRule.dnsServerConfigs.port: Port of the external DNS server
